opportunityId.description: Opportunity ID to update (use this if you have the ID).

name.description: Opportunity name for lookup (supports partial match) or to update the name.

accountId.description: Account ID to filter opportunity lookup by account, or to move opportunity to different account.

stageName.description: Update stage: 'Prospecting', 'Qualification', 'Needs Analysis', 'Value Proposition', 'Proposal/Price Quote', 'Negotiation/Review', 'Closed Won', 'Closed Lost'.

nextStep.description: Update next action. E.g., 'Send revised proposal', 'Schedule executive meeting'.
